overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a cyberpunk urban environment at night. The scene features narrow neon-lit alleyways with food stalls, vending machines, and digital billboards in a futuristic Asian-inspired city district with green and red neon lighting.

glowing neon signs in green and red colors

segments.scene_description: Walking through a densely packed narrow alley illuminated by red paper lanterns and vertical neon signs. The camera passes pedestrians moving in the opposite direction and various market stalls lining the concrete walkway.

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores tight back alleys with green utility doors, air conditioning units, and storage crates. The lighting becomes darker with fewer neon signs, focusing on industrial and service areas of the cyberpunk district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a cyberpunk district, moving from vibrant, neon-lit commercial corridors into the gritty, industrial depths of the city. It begins in a narrow alley lined with food stalls and green stools, where traditional paper lanterns blend with neon signage before the path opens into a wider street dominated by massive digital billboards and yellow barriers. The camera then pauses at a green-lit vendor stall before turning toward a burning dumpster and ascending concrete stairs into an elevated plaza filled with vending machines and pedestrians. As the movement continues, the scene shifts back into a densely packed alleyway illuminated by red lanterns and vertical signs, passing market stalls and oncoming crowds. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into tight back alleys, where the bright advertisements fade into a darker environment of green utility doors, air conditioning units, and storage crates.
